Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3305-08-22
Food Delivery Initiative Concludes Successfully
The food delivery campaign to Chamas concludes successfully. The fundraiser enables immediate construction of a new asteroid base.
3305-08-15
Food Delivery Initiative in the Chamas System
The Fortunes Corsairs organise a food delivery initiative to Chamas to support a fundraising event for a new asteroid base. Eminent chefs prepare a grand feast for system officials.
